title: Keep the Same Item Across Multiple Boards — Without Extra Effort

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
When an item needs to exist in multiple boards, duplicating it manually quickly creates inconsistencies.

Updates get missed, files live in different places, and teams spend time figuring out which version is current.

A connected mirroring setup ensures that the same item stays synchronized everywhere it appears, allowing teams to work independently while keeping information aligned.

Mirror Item Multiple Boards app is designed to make this process simple while still giving teams full operational flexibility.

Built for flexible mirroring at scale

  • Mirror the same item, including subitems, updates, and files, across multiple boards while keeping everything continuously synchronised. Choose to sync update

    image2600×1348 206 KB

  • See which boards the updates are posted from -

    image1460×690 50.9 KB

  • Mirror items to multiple destination boards at the same time, removing the need to recreate connections repeatedly

  • Use automations to automatically create mirrored items based on status changes or workflow triggers like ‘when person is assigned’

  • Perform bulk mirroring to move large groups of items to another board in one action

  • Track all connections clearly through the Sync Table, making it easy to understand where each item is mirrored

    image2622×1194 190 KB

  • Quickly navigate between linked items using direct item links automatically created during mirroring. Add custom emoji’s to linked items.

    image1566×552 43.6 KB

  • Connect board columns are also automatically copied over, you can also choose to auto-fill them for the mirrored item. Pre-filled ones sync too!

    image1370×348 29 KB

The goal is straightforward: allow items to live wherever they are needed while remaining one connected record.

Give the Mirror Item Multiple Boards app a try today!

Reach out to us at support@fortimus.co for any questions.

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Fortimus_Team

If you want changes in one board to automatically update another board, use a Connect boards column with Mirror columns.

Connect boards links the items. Mirror columns display fields like Status, Numbers, or Timeline from the connected board. Any updates made in the source board will sync automatically.

You can also use board automations if you need actions triggered between boards.

Dr. Tanvi Sachar
Monday Certified Partner, Tuesday Wizard

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @drtanvisachar ,

Mirror columns don’t sync values between items and don’t sync updates and subitems. Also, I need to have everything in sync, so adding so many mirror columns won’t be clean for the board.

Thanks for your help!

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Fortimus_Team
Yep, you’re 100% right.

Mirror columns are read only, so they don’t truly sync updates back and subitems won’t stay in sync either. If you need real two way syncing, the best options are automations to copy values between boards or an integration tool like Make/Zapier for full syncing at scale.

If you’d like hands-on help or want us to walk through this live, you can book a 1:1 paid 60-minute strategy session with our team here:
